SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.depressurization

Class BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.depressurization.BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer extends Object implements Serializable
Screening analyser for the MORE PRESSURE / blocked-outlet overpressure HAZOP deviation.

When a vessel keeps receiving feed while its outlet is inadvertently blocked (a closed valve, a tripped downstream unit, or a control failure), the trapped gas inventory grows and the pressure rises until a pressure-relief device lifts. This analyser quantifies how quickly the vessel reaches its relief set pressure by reusing the validated coupled mass-and-energy transient in VesselFillingSimulator (the same charging physics used for cylinder filling), then reports the time-to-set-pressure and the relief demand for a HAZOP team.

This is a screening calculation: it assumes the inflow continues unabated with no outflow, which is the conservative basis for a blocked-outlet contingency in API 521. It does not size the relief device — pair it with ReliefValveSizing for the required orifice area once the relieving rate is known.

References: API Standard 521 (Pressure-relieving and Depressuring Systems), §4.4 (blocked outlet / closed-outlet contingency).

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer

      public BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer(SystemInterface fluid, double vesselVolume)
      Construct a blocked-outlet overpressure analyser.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the residual gas inventory in the vessel at the moment the outlet blocks; must already have its mixing rule set
      vesselVolume - internal vessel volume in m³; must be positive
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if fluid is null or vesselVolume is not positive

  • Method Details

    • setInletConditions

      public BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer setInletConditions(double inletTemperatureK, double supplyPressureBara, double massFlowKgPerS)
      Set the continued inlet feed conditions that drive the pressure build-up while the outlet is blocked.
      Parameters:
      inletTemperatureK - feed gas stagnation temperature in K; must be positive
      supplyPressureBara - feed supply pressure in bara used to evaluate the inlet enthalpy; must be positive
      massFlowKgPerS - continued feed mass flow into the blocked vessel in kg/s; must be positive
      Returns:
      this analyser for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any argument is not positive

    • setReliefSetPressure

      public BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer setReliefSetPressure(double reliefSetPressureBara)
      Set the pressure-relief device set pressure used as the overpressure threshold.
      Parameters:
      reliefSetPressureBara - relief set pressure in bara; must be positive
      Returns:
      this analyser for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if reliefSetPressureBara is not positive

    • setTimeStep

      public BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer setTimeStep(double timeStepSeconds)
      Set the integration time step.
      Parameters:
      timeStepSeconds - time step in seconds; must be positive
      Returns:
      this analyser for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if timeStepSeconds is not positive

    • setMaxTime

      public BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer setMaxTime(double maxTimeSeconds)
      Set the maximum simulated time horizon.
      Parameters:
      maxTimeSeconds - maximum simulated time in seconds; must be positive
      Returns:
      this analyser for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if maxTimeSeconds is not positive

    • run

      public BlockedOutletOverpressureAnalyzer.BlockedOutletResult run()
      Run the blocked-outlet pressure build-up screening and return the result.
      Returns:
      the blocked-outlet overpressure result
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the inlet conditions or relief set pressure have not been configured
